摘要： 嵌套 | 字段 | 构造方法 | 方法 详细信息： 字段 | 构造方法 | 方法

ballad.selog
类 Logger

java.lang.Object
  ballad.selog.BasicLogger
      ballad.selog.Logger

public class Logger
extends BasicLogger

SimplE LOG (SELOG) -- A lightweight log tool for Java.

Common Logger, Java SE Program can use this Class.

When using this class, you shall call this class in this way when your program starts:
Logger.initLogger(projcetName,logLevel,logType,logFileName);
To print a log:
Logger logger = Logger.getLogger();
logger.trace("This is a Test Log Content");
when your program ends, you need call this function:
Logger.close();
Above are sample codes.

版本：
0.1 2011/11/17
作者：
Ballad

Logger

private Logger()

Logger

方法详细信息

initLogger

public static Logger initLogger(java.lang.String projcetName,
                                int logLevel,
                                int logType,
                                java.lang.String logFileName)
Call this function when you program start. If you don't call this function, well, the Logger will use the default setting, to see default setting, you can see #LogSupport. You shall not call this method more than one time, well, if you call this method many times, the configuration of Logger will use the last time's call's parameters.

getLogger

public static Logger getLogger()
This method is used for getting the Logger Instance.

返回：
Logger Instance

getLogger

public static Logger getLogger(java.lang.String projectName)
This method is used for getting the Logger Instance.

参数：
projectName -
返回：
Logger Instance

trace

public void trace(java.lang.String logCont)
This method is used for print the log's content in trace level.

参数：
logCont -

error

public void error(java.lang.String logCont)
This method is used for print the log's content in error level.

参数：
logCont -

fault

public void fault(java.lang.String logCont)
This method is used for print the log's content in fault level.

参数：
logCont -

close

public void close()
